Keypoint-level p-caught across all stories

Interactive view of html/all_stories_keypoints_filtered.csv, which has one row per multi-segment keypoint (clause). For each keypoint it aggregates human and model p-caught values over its segment_ids and computes min, max, mean, and mean_minus_human across models. The table is sorted by mean_minus_human so you can quickly see key ideas where models under-catch or over-catch relative to humans.

story segment_rel_pos models_mean human_pcaught mean_minus_human clause_text segment_ids gpt4o_pcaught llama4_pcaught deep_seek_pcaught oss_120_pcaught models_min models_max
